referenceVisualNotes.heroLayout: Large split hero with left text stack and right doctor image block, plus floating UI badges over the media area.
referenceVisualNotes.heroTypography: Bold modern sans heading with short lines and compact supporting copy.
referenceVisualNotes.statsBar: Horizontal four-item stat row in simple cards directly after the hero.
referenceVisualNotes.servicesSection: Card-based service grid with category tabs controlling visible card set.
referenceVisualNotes.featureSection: Dark centerpiece panel with a two-column layout: feature cards on one side and supporting image on the other.
referenceVisualNotes.testimonials: Single featured quote card with star row and dot navigation instead of a dense three-column wall.
referenceVisualNotes.sectionRhythm: Hero overlay -> white stats card row -> light trust section -> dark feature section -> light service grid -> light team carousel -> tinted quote section -> contact/footer.
referenceVisualNotes.whitespace: Moderately airy spacing with clear section separation and consistent shell gutters.
referenceVisualNotes.buttonStyle: Pill buttons with one filled primary action and one outlined/ghost secondary action.
referenceVisualNotes.colorApplication: Blue-teal hues lead CTAs and icons, with deep blue in the dark feature section and light cool tints on supporting backgrounds.
